scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail -n api,admin,web -c blue,green,yellow "pnpm --filter @contenthead/api dev" "pnpm --filter @contenthead/admin dev" "pnpm --filter @contenthead/web dev"
scripts.restart:full: pnpm run stop && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/clean-web-cache.ps1 && pnpm dev
scripts.codegen: pnpm --filter @contenthead/admin codegen && pnpm --filter @contenthead/web codegen && pnpm --filter @contenthead/sdk codegen
scripts.build: pnpm schema && pnpm codegen && pnpm -r build
scripts.test:health: pnpm --filter @contenthead/api seed && pnpm ops:inventory && pnpm --filter @contenthead/api test && pnpm --filter @contenthead/admin test
